rulings.Case Title: ERIN WIDEN VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Moton For Summary Adjudication Against Cross-Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 15, 2022 line 1. CROSS-COMPLAINANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTON FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AGAINST CROSS-DEFENDANTS is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and Cross-Defendant failed to create a triable issue of material fact with competent admissible evidence regarding nuisance. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JUAN SALAS ET AL VS. GALE LEA GRINSELL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION To The Second-Amended Complaint Of Juan Salas
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 15, 2022 line 4. DEFENDANTS GALE LEA GRINSELL AND FOUNDERS REALTY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION TO THE SECOND-AMENDED COMPLAINT OF JUAN SALAS is continued to December 19, 2022 for (1) the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers no later than December 15, 2022 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date (reply received); and (2) for opposing party to provide a properly bound and tabbed set of opposition papers. Unbound copy received by the Court is placed in the outbox and shall be picked up by the Plaintiff to be used to provide a properly bound and tabbed copy no later than December 15, 2022. All courtesy copies must be received by 11:00 a.m. on December 15, 2022. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. ALANNA STEWART ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 15, 2022 line 10. DEFENDANT ALANNA STEWART'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT is GRANTED in part. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall remit $3,500 to the defendant, comply with its obligations under the security deposit laws, and file a request for dismissal within 5 days of notice of order. To the extent the defendant is seeking damages for failure to timely comply with the security deposit laws, no authority is cited for the proposition that such relief may be granted via this motion. Defendant may file a separate action. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
